behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC 'Mythran'. It provides: a short U8P_MYTHRAN::look/identify response, a menu-driven conversation system (greetings, lore, shops, and lessons), three shop flows (single-U8P_MYTHRAN::use Scroll of Dispelling, reagent categories, and spell/lesson offering), basic daily scheduling, fast-area entry/exit handlers to set/clear NPC activity, and a casting behavior that spawns effects and runs a small monologue/animation sequence.

Dialogue is Ask/SuspendAssign driven: menus are built/modified in arrays (locals like local1/local4/local5/local8) and compared via strcmp to dispatch into subroutines. Several persistent flags gate availability of menu options and prevent repeated explanatory text.

Purchases validate payment by searching for obsidian (FREE::findNearbyItems), then attempt to directly equip the created item to the player (FREE::equipItem) and fall back to creating the item at a nearby location (FREE::createItemsAtLocation) if equip fails.

Schedule() computes time-of-day dependent parameters and calls an engine helper (METHOD::func133F) to apply movement/activity. U8P_MYTHRAN::enterFastArea sets an activity via Npc::cSetActivity when actors enter a trigger; U8P_MYTHRAN::leaveFastArea clears the fast-area reference via FREE::resetRef.

U8P_MYTHRAN::cast(uword) is a behavior process that either repeatedly spawns effects when no valid target exists (countdown loop) or, if a living target exists, puts the avatar into stasis, runs staged spawn/call sequences (METHOD::func15E7 & spawn helpers) and invokes a short monologue/visual sequence (U8P_MYTHRAN::func9ED6).
notable_control_flow: Main conversation loops: central dispatcher U8P_MYTHRAN::func27B4 (and variants U8P_MYTHRAN::func65C3 / U8P_MYTHRAN::func87A8) build a menu array each iteration, Ask -> SuspendAssign captures the player's choice, then strcmp branches to calls or lines. MenuSet/MenuUnion/MenuAdd/MenuRemove mutate options across iterations.
Guard flags prevent repeated long explanations: lockSpellSpeech and knowAboutReagents are read to decide whether to show long explanatory text and are written after the long text is shown.

Shop transaction flow (U8P_MYTHRAN::func01EF): explain -> confirm menu -> check for 50 obsidian via FREE::findNearbyItems -> if found, get Item::getX/Y/Z -> attempt FREE::equipItem -> fallback FREE::createItemsAtLocation -> set temporary phrasing flags like heardScrollJust.
Scheduling: U8P_MYTHRAN::schedule queries FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod and assigns period-specific locals, then calls METHOD::func133F to commit activity/position values.
Fast-area handling: U8P_MYTHRAN::enterFastArea spawns an activity (Npc::cSetActivity) if NPC not dead; U8P_MYTHRAN::leaveFastArea calls FREE::resetRef for cleanup.

Casting: U8P_MYTHRAN::cast(uword) uses a numeric countdown (local1) in a spawn/suspend loop when no target; when target present and alive it sequences stasis, repeated METHOD::func15E7 calls, then invokes U8P_MYTHRAN::func9ED6 for a visual/dialog sequence.
open_questions: Exact numeric meanings of many local hex constants used by U8P_MYTHRAN::schedule and U8P_MYTHRAN::func143C (they appear to encode positions/spell ids/costs but mapping to in-game IDs is not recovered).
Precise item proto/id values used when creating the Scroll of Dispelling or reagents (the script calls FREE::createItemsAtLocation and equip but proto ids are inferred only from context).
Parameter semantics for U8P_MYTHRAN::cast(uword): the single uword likely selects a spell/effect, but the mapping between that parameter and displayed/created effects is inferred, not explicit.

Whether any of the set flags written by shops/lessons (e.g., heardScrollJust) persist beyond the conversation instance or are transient script flags managed by the engine (the metadata suggests persistent global flags but exact persistence is unclear).

main_function.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/identify response for Mythran. Chooses a brief bark depending on persistent identity flags (emit proper name 'Mythran' if mythranName is set; otherwise job label if mythranJob is set; default 'man ').
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player inspects/looks at the NPC (U8P_MYTHRAN::look/examine action).

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::look
function_map.role: Short U8P_MYTHRAN::look/examine response selecting between 'Mythran', 'mage ', or 'man ' based on mythranName/mythranJob flags.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::schedule
function_map.role: Compute and apply Mythran's per-time-of-day U8P_MYTHRAN::schedule/position values and call METHOD::func133F to apply them.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry handler: if NPC alive spawn/set an activity via Npc::cSetActivity.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit handler: clear stored fast-area ref via FREE::resetRef.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func01EF
function_map.role: Scroll-of-Dispelling shop flow: explain scroll, check for 50 obsidian, create/equip or drop scroll, set temporary phrasing flags.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func08A6
function_map.role: Reagent shop submenu: present reagent categories and specific reagent choices, prepare parameters for purchase flow.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func143C
function_map.role: Spell-teaching/lesson selector: check progression flags to offer teachable spells or deny if too early, set local parameters for teaching.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::use
function_map.role: Conversation entry point: BeginConversation, clear wantsSpells/wantsScrolls/didReagents, greet and dispatch to appropriate greeting/menu subroutines.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func219B
function_map.role: Greeting/root conversation builder: assemble initial menu, handle asking player's name and first-time meeting flow, dispatch into central dialog.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func27B4
function_map.role: Central conversation/menu dispatcher: dynamic menu construction and routing into shops, lore, and teaching branches.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func48FE
function_map.role: Short monologue about Mythran's essay/book and loaning it to the player.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func4A45
function_map.role: Longer lore branch about the people of Pagan and schools of magic; dynamic menu loop and conditional lore lines.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func64C5
function_map.role: Confirmation submenu (Yes/No) that routes to U8P_MYTHRAN::func01EF/U8P_MYTHRAN::func08A6/U8P_MYTHRAN::func143C depending on wantsScrolls/wantsReagents/wantsSpells.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func65C3
function_map.role: Friend/shopkeeper conversation branch assembling many menu options and dispatching to shops, lore and teaching helpers.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func87A8
function_map.role: Alternate greeting/menu builder used in special contexts (e.g., mythranSaidBlackLore) similar to U8P_MYTHRAN::func65C3.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::cast
function_map.role: Spell-U8P_MYTHRAN::cast/behavior process with a uword parameter: spawn loop when no target; staged stasis-and-effect sequence when a target exists.

function_map.name: U8P_MYTHRAN::func9ED6
function_map.role: Monologue/effect sequence invoked by U8P_MYTHRAN::cast: spawns visual/projectile effects, animates temporary items, applies hits and sound, and drives timing.

internal_calls.purpose: Dispatch to first-meet greeting/root conversation when mythranMet is false.
Default conversation branch for friend/shopkeeper interactions.
Alternate greeting/menu branch selected under special item/frame or lore state.
Invoke the scroll-selling shop flow when the player selects to buy scrolls.
Invoke reagent submenu for reagent purchases.
Invoke spell teaching/shop decision routine when player wants lessons.
Run the monologue/effect sequence at the end of a target-directed casting sequence.
Hand off to central conversation/menu system after name/intro handling.

external_calls.purpose: Query current time-of-day to select U8P_MYTHRAN::schedule/position parameters.
Apply movement/activity/scheduling values computed by U8P_MYTHRAN::schedule().
Request/launch an NPC activity when an actor enters the fast region.
Clear the stored fast-area reference for this NPC when an actor exits the region.
Locate 50 obsidian (player payment) in inventory/nearby to validate purchase.
Get X coordinate of the located payment item to compute item drop/create location.
Get Y coordinate for create/spawn fallback placement.
Get Z coordinate/stack height for placement calculations.
Attempt to equip/give the purchased scroll directly to the player; used to complete the sale cleanly.
Fallback to create the purchased item at a nearby location if equip fails.
Spawn helper used in no-target spawn loop to create temporary actors/effects.
Lower-level step used repeatedly during a target-directed U8P_MYTHRAN::cast sequence.
Put the avatar in stasis during a target-directed casting sequence.
Compute positions for temporary effect items created during the monologue/attack sequence.
Compute positions for temporary effect items.
Compute Z offset for popping temporary items into world space.
Animate temporary items over multiple frames during the visual sequence.
Apply visual/mechanical hit to a target NPC (uses HP/Dir), part of the scripted attack.
Mark the NPC dead as part of the scripted sequence (appears to be used during the effect sequence).

reads.name: mythranName
reads.likely_effect: When true, causes the U8P_MYTHRAN::look() bark to U8P_MYTHRAN::use the NPC's proper name ('Mythran').

reads.name: mythranJob
reads.likely_effect: When true and mythranName is false, causes the U8P_MYTHRAN::look() bark to emit job label ('mage ').

reads.name: lockSpellSpeech
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeating the long explanatory spell-of-opening speech; read to decide variant phrasing.

reads.name: knowAboutReagents
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Mythran gives a long reagent explanation or a short reminder; used to avoid repetition.

reads.name: mythranMet
reads.likely_effect: Controls first-meeting flow; when false triggers first-meet greeting and name-handling branches.

reads.name: mythranAvaName
reads.likely_effect: Used to personalize greeting with player's name when set.

reads.name: wantsSpells
reads.likely_effect: When true, causes menu flows to include spell-teaching and related reagent options.

reads.name: mythranScrolls
reads.likely_effect: Enables the 'I wish to buy scrolls.' menu option in conversation menus.

reads.name: mythReagents
reads.likely_effect: Controls availability of reagent-purchase options across menus.

reads.name: benticSaidMythran
reads.likely_effect: Used to gate certain world-lore menu options (e.g., how to leave Pagan).

writes.name: lockSpellSpeech
writes.likely_effect: Set after Mythran gives the long explanatory scroll speech to suppress repeat explanations later.

writes.name: heardScrollJust
writes.likely_effect: Temporarily set when the scroll price/explanation was given to alter immediate subsequent phrasing.

writes.name: knowAboutReagents
writes.likely_effect: Set when Mythran explains reagent availability so the long explanatory line is not repeated.

writes.name: mythranName
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player asks Mythran his name (marks that his proper name should be used in U8P_MYTHRAN::look/bark).

writes.name: mythranAvaName
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player gives their name to Mythran (records that Mythran learned the avatar's name).

writes.name: mythranMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to mark that the player has met Mythran (used by future greeting/branch logic).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC 'Mythran'. It provides: a short U8P_MYTHRAN::look/identify response, a menu-driven conversation system (greetings, lore, shops, and lessons), three shop flows (single-U8P_MYTHRAN::use Scroll of Dispelling, reagent categories, and spell/lesson offering), basic daily scheduling, fast-area entry/exit handlers to set/clear NPC activity, and a casting behavior that spawns effects and runs a small monologue/animation sequence.
